title: calceolaria ruiz-lealii
intro: Calceolaria ruiz-lealii, also known as the Slipper Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the Calceolaria genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation, due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Calceolaria ruiz-lealii include relieving coughs, colds, and flu symptoms, as well as reducing fever and swelling. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and inflammatory conditions.
